item.title: The Best TVs We’ve Reviewed in 2026: Sony, Samsung, LG, and More
item.description: From LEDs to fancy OLED models, these are our favorite televisions at every price.

item.title: 6 Best Gaming Laptops (2026): Tested and Reviewed
item.description: We tested the latest and greatest gaming laptops, and whittled our list down to the six absolute best you can buy right now.

item.title: 4 Best Résumé Builders (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Ditch the old Word doc that's hanging on by a thread. A proper résumé builder can help you stand out from the crowd.

item.title: Even Realities G2 Review: Smarter Glasses
item.description: These second-generation smart glasses give you superpowers—if the software behaves.

item.title: Bidets Are Confusing Visitors at the 2026 Winter Olympics
item.description: Bidets are extremely common in northern Italy, where the Milano Cortina Games are being played. They’re less familiar to the people visiting.
